subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Fix thy gaze upon the loving-kindness and favors of God. He hath confirmed thee in the recognition of His sanctified Being and His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی بشفقت و عنایت حق ناظر باش ترا تایید فرمود بر عرفان ذات مقدسش و راه
subcodes.subjects: @presence of; reunion with God, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
